name: Philadelphia Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Crust: In a bowl, combine flour, salt, and butter. Cut the butter into the flour until it forms a crumbly mixture. Gradually add ice water, tossing to form a ball. Roll out to fit a 12-inch pie pan. Sprinkle with cinnamon.
2. Bake crust at 400°F (200°C) for 20 minutes.
3. Filling: In a separate bowl, mix the apples, sugar, vanilla, salt, brown sugar, granulated sugar, flour, and chopped walnuts.
4. Fill the shell with the apple filling.
5. Bake at 450°F (230°C) for 10 minutes, then reduce temperature to 350°F (175°C) and bake for an additional 40 minutes.
6. Topping: Sprinkle the top of the pie with the remaining flour mixture.
7. Bake for an additional 15 minutes.
